title: 发送报价、付款方式和 PI
theme: 从 quotation / payment terms / PI 开始
goals: 能清楚说明报价单、单价、付款方式和报价有效期
能礼貌引导客户确认订单后安排 PI
能解释定金、尾款和银行信息，避免付款沟通含糊

review.title: Day 03 复习
items: 昨天练了 MOQ、sample cost、lead time、production 和 shipping cost。
今天进入报价后的下一步：发送 quotation、确认 payment terms、准备 PI。
客户准备下单时，不要只说 pay now，要先确认订单细节和付款方式。

preview.scenario: 客户已经确认数量、规格、样品或交期，现在要求正式报价，并询问付款方式和 PI。
needToKnow: quotation 是报价单或报价内容，比 price 更完整。
payment terms 要说清楚定金、尾款和付款节点。
PI 是 proforma invoice，通常在客户确认订单细节后发送。

vocabulary.usage: 用于给客户正式报价或发送报价单。
vocabulary.example: I will prepare the quotation and send it to you today.
The unit price is 2.5 dollars for 1,000 pieces.

vocabulary.meaning: 付款方式 / 付款条款
vocabulary.usage: 说明定金、尾款和付款节点。
vocabulary.example: Our payment terms are 30 percent deposit and 70 percent balance before shipment.

vocabulary.usage: 用于订单开始生产前的预付款。
vocabulary.example: We can start production after receiving the deposit.

vocabulary.usage: 用于发货前客户需要支付的剩余款项。
vocabulary.example: The balance should be paid before shipment.

vocabulary.usage: proforma invoice 的缩写，用于客户确认订单和付款。
vocabulary.example: I will send the PI after you confirm the order details.

vocabulary.usage: 用于说明收款账户资料。
vocabulary.example: The bank information is included in the PI.
This quotation is valid for 7 days.

sentences.label: 发送报价
sentences.natural: I will send you the price.
sentences.business: I will prepare the quotation and send it to you today.

sentences.label: 说明单价
sentences.business: The unit price is 2.5 dollars based on 1,000 pieces and standard packaging.

sentences.label: 说明付款方式
sentences.natural: Our payment terms are 30 percent deposit and 70 percent balance.
sentences.business: Our payment terms are 30 percent deposit before production and 70 percent balance before shipment.

sentences.label: 发送 PI
sentences.natural: I will send you the PI.
sentences.business: After you confirm the order details, I will prepare the PI for your payment arrangement.

sentences.label: 报价有效期
sentences.natural: This price is valid for 7 days.
sentences.business: This quotation is valid for 7 days because material costs may change.

chatAnalysis.problem: 没有说明币种、数量基础和包装条件，客户可能误解。
chatAnalysis.upgrade: The unit price is 2.5 dollars based on 1,000 pieces and standard packaging.

chatAnalysis.problem: 表达不完整，不清楚是定金还是全款，也没有说明尾款时间。
chatAnalysis.better: The payment terms are 30 percent deposit and 70 percent balance.
chatAnalysis.upgrade: Our payment terms are 30 percent deposit before production and 70 percent balance before shipment.

chatAnalysis.problem: 太急，最好先让客户确认订单细节，避免 PI 信息错误。
chatAnalysis.better: I will send the PI after you confirm the details.
chatAnalysis.upgrade: After you confirm the quantity, specification, shipping method, and company information, I will prepare the PI for you.

dialogues.title: 慢速基础版：发送正式报价

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can you send me the quotation?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Sure. I will prepare the quotation and send it to you today.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please include the unit price.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: No problem. I will include the unit price, quantity, packaging, and lead time.

dialogues.title: 正常商务版：说明付款方式

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: What are your payment terms?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Our payment terms are 30 percent deposit before production and 70 percent balance before shipment.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can you send the PI?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Sure. Please confirm the order details first, and I will prepare the PI for you.

dialogues.title: 压力场景版：客户要求价格保持不变

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can you keep this price for one month?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: This quotation is valid for 7 days because material costs may change.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: We need more time to decide.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: I understand. If you need more time, I can recheck the price before you place the order.

longDialogues.title: 长对话实战：从正式报价到 PI 和付款安排

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Hi, we confirmed the quantity and logo details.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Thank you. I will prepare the quotation based on the confirmed details.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please include the unit price and total amount.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Sure. I will include the unit price, total amount, packaging, lead time, and shipping cost.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: What is the unit price for 1,000 pieces?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: The unit price is 2.5 dollars based on 1,000 pieces and standard packaging.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Does this price include our logo?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Yes, this price includes one color logo printing.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Does it include shipping cost?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: No, the unit price does not include shipping cost. I will list the shipping cost separately.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: How long is this quotation valid?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: This quotation is valid for 7 days because material costs may change.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: What are your payment terms?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Our payment terms are 30 percent deposit before production and 70 percent balance before shipment.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can we pay 50 percent before production and 50 percent after delivery?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: For the first order, we usually need the balance before shipment. I can check if there is any flexibility.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Okay. Please send the PI first.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Sure. Before I prepare the PI, please confirm the company name and billing address.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: I will send the company information now.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Thank you. Please also confirm the shipping method and delivery address.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: We prefer air shipping for this order.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Got it. I will include air shipping cost in the PI.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Where can we find your bank information?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: The bank information will be included in the PI.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: After we pay the deposit, when can you start production?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: We can start production after receiving the deposit and confirming all order details.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please send the quotation and PI today.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Sure. I will send the quotation first, and after you confirm it, I will prepare the PI today.

exercises.prompt: 中译英：我今天会准备报价单并发给你。
exercises.answer: I will prepare the quotation and send it to you today.
acceptable: i will prepare the quotation and send it to you today
i will prepare the quotation and send you today
exercises.hint: quotation 表示报价或报价单。

exercises.prompt: 把这句话改得更自然：price is 2.5
exercises.hint: 说明是 unit price，并加上币种。

exercises.prompt: 填空：Our payment terms are 30 percent deposit and 70 percent ____ before shipment.
客户让你马上发 PI，哪个回复更适合？
options: Please confirm the order details first, and I will prepare the PI for you.
exercises.answer: Please confirm the order details first, and I will prepare the PI for you.
acceptable: please confirm the order details first and i will prepare the pi for you
exercises.hint: 先确认订单细节，再准备 PI。

exercises.prompt: 中译英：银行信息会包含在 PI 里。
exercises.answer: The bank information will be included in the PI.
acceptable: the bank information will be included in the pi
bank information will be included in the pi
exercises.hint: bank information 表示银行信息。

exercises.prompt: 客户说：Can you keep this price for one month? 你应该怎么回复？
exercises.answer: This quotation is valid for 7 days because material costs may change. If you need more time, I can recheck the price before you place the order.
acceptable: this quotation is valid for 7 days because material costs may change
the quotation is valid for 7 days
i can recheck the price before you place the order
exercises.hint: 说明报价有效期和原因，再给后续方案。

homework: 把 quotation、unit price、payment terms、deposit、balance、PI 各造 1 句。
把 5 个核心句子的 business 版本各读 5 遍。
跟读长对话 2 遍，重点练报价有效期和 PI 前确认。
tomorrow: Day 5 会练包装、唛头和出货方式的表达。
